name: LinkedIn Outreach - AI Personalised Connection Requests

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs Mon-Fri at 11am. Edit triggerAtDay to change days. 1=Mon, 2=Tue, 3=Wed, 4=Thu, 5=Fri

nodes.name: Wait Until Start Time
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_WEBHOOK_ID_1 with a unique ID (e.g. wait-start-001)

nodes.name: Get Unsent Connections
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from your Google Sheet. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your actual Sheet ID (found in the URL). Sheet must have column: LinkedIn Connection Sent — leave blank for unsent contacts.

nodes.name: Apply Random Limit
nodes.notes: Filters to unsent contacts only. Randomly picks 8-12 per day to mimic human behaviour. Adjust minConnections and maxConnections as needed.

nodes.name: Process One by One
nodes.notes: Processes contacts one at a time. This is critical — do NOT change to batch mode or LinkedIn will detect automation.

nodes.name: Get LinkedIn Profile Data
nodes.notes: Fetches live LinkedIn profile data via Browserflow. Replace YOUR_BROWSERFLOW_CREDENTIAL_ID. Requires Browserflow subscription at browserflow.app

nodes.name: Wait After Profile
nodes.notes: 2 minute pause after fetching profile — avoids hitting LinkedIn rate limits

nodes.name: Identify Functional Area
nodes.notes: Detects pharma functional area from job title. Add more keywords to departmentMap as needed for your target personas.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert at writing ultra-concise LinkedIn connection messages for pharmaceutical professionals.

CONTEXT:
YOUR_COMPANY has developed YOUR_PRODUCT, an AI-powered pharmaceutical intelligence platform that automates workflows across Medical Affairs, Regulatory, Market Access, Clinical Development, and HEOR.

RECIPIENT:
- Name: {{ $json.data.name.split(' ')[0] }}
- Title: {{ $json.data.experience[0].job_title }}
- Company: {{ $json.data.experience[0].company_name }}
- Functional Area: {{ $json.functionalArea }}

STRICT REQUIREMENTS:
1. Length: 100-120 characters (STRICT - count carefully)
2. MUST include one of: "AI solution", "AI application", "AI-powered platform", "AI platform"
3. Use first person: "we have developed" or "our"
4. Professional, consultative tone
5. Never mention competitor products
6. Never sound salesy or pushy

MESSAGE PATTERNS (choose one randomly):

PATTERN 1 - Capability Focus:
"Hi {name}, we have developed a/an [AI-powered platform/AI solution] for {function}—[benefit]. [CTA]?"

PATTERN 2 - Problem-Solution Focus:
"Hi {name}, Tackle [pain point] with our [AI solution/AI platform]—[metric]. [CTA]?"

FUNCTIONAL BENEFITS:
- Medical Affairs: 80% faster evidence synthesis, publication automation, MSL intelligence
- Regulatory: 50% faster submissions, compliance tracking, regulatory pathways
- Market Access: 65% higher formulary acceptance, payer intelligence, 70% cost reduction
- Clinical Development: 50% faster protocols, reduced trial duration, patient recruitment
- HEOR: Accelerates evidence generation, health economic modeling, RWE generation
- Commercial: KOL mapping, launch orchestration, competitive intelligence

PAIN POINTS BY FUNCTION:
- Medical Affairs: publication planning gaps, evidence synthesis bottlenecks
- Regulatory: submission timelines, FDA documentation workflows
- Market Access: payer negotiations, formulary access challenges
- Clinical Development: trial design complexity, patient recruitment delays
- HEOR: health economic modeling time, RWE evidence generation
- Commercial: launch coordination, competitive intelligence gaps

CTAs (pick one randomly):
- Worth exploring?
- Worth a chat?
- Quick demo?
- Brief call?
- Worth discussing?

CRITICAL: Count characters carefully. Must be 100-120 characters total.

Generate ONE message following all requirements. Return ONLY the message, no explanation.

nodes.name: Generate AI Message
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: Replace YOUR_COMPANY and YOUR_PRODUCT in the prompt above with your actual company and product names before running.

nodes.name: Claude AI Model
nodes.notes: Uses Claude Sonnet for message generation. Replace YOUR_ANTHROPIC_CREDENTIAL_ID. Get your API key at console.anthropic.com. IMPROVEMENT: Switched from OpenAI GPT-4o to Claude for better pharma domain understanding and lower cost.

nodes.name: Validate Message Quality
nodes.notes: Validates 5 quality checks. If any fail, contact is skipped and workflow moves to next person. Adjust checks as needed.

nodes.name: Message Quality Check
nodes.notes: TRUE path = message passed validation, proceed to send. FALSE path = message failed, skip to next contact.

nodes.name: Check Connection Status
nodes.notes: Checks if already connected or request already pending. Prevents sending duplicate requests which LinkedIn penalises.

nodes.name: Wait After Check
nodes.notes: 1 minute pause after connection status check

nodes.name: Can Send Request
nodes.notes: Only proceeds if BOTH is_connection=false AND is_pending=false. If already connected or pending — routes to SKIP.

nodes.name: Calculate Pre-Send Wait
nodes.notes: Saves contact data to state before the wait — required because data can be lost across wait nodes. Adjust minWait/maxWait if needed.

nodes.name: Wait Before Send
nodes.notes: Random 15-35 minute human behaviour wait before sending

nodes.name: Try Send Connection WITH Message
nodes.notes: Attempts to send connection WITH the AI-generated personalised message. If this fails (e.g. profile has messaging disabled), falls back to blank connection request.

nodes.name: Wait After Send Attempt
nodes.notes: 2 minute pause after send attempt before checking if it worked

nodes.name: Message Sent Successfully
nodes.notes: TRUE = sent with message, update sheet as 'YES + MESSAGE'. FALSE = send failed, try blank request instead.

nodes.name: Update Sheet - Sent with Message
nodes.notes: Logs successful sends. Status = 'YES + MESSAGE'. Records the exact message sent and date.

nodes.name: Send Blank Connection Request
nodes.notes: Fallback when personalised message fails. Sends a blank connection request with no note. Still logs to sheet as 'YES (BLANK)'.

nodes.name: Wait After Blank Send
nodes.notes: 2 minute pause after blank send

value.Message Sent: Blank request — profile did not support connection note

nodes.name: Update Sheet - Sent Blank
nodes.notes: Logs blank send. Status = 'YES (BLANK)'. Notes that personalised message was not supported.

nodes.name: Calculate Next Person Wait
nodes.notes: Adjust minWait/maxWait to change spacing between contacts. Keep at least 10 minutes minimum.

nodes.name: Wait Next Person
nodes.notes: Random 10-25 minute wait before next contact

nodes.name: Update Sheet - Skip
nodes.notes: Logs skipped contacts (already connected or request pending). Status = 'SKIPPED'.

nodes.name: Wait Skip
nodes.notes: 5-15 minute wait after skipping a contact before moving to next
